name: @rundown-studio/consts
description: Shared constants for the Rundown Studio project
author: Lukas Hermann <hey@lukashermann.dev>

scripts.postinstall: node -e "process.emitWarning('@rundown-studio/consts is deprecated and being phased out in favour of @rundown-studio/utils. Migrate imports to @rundown-studio/utils.', { type: 'DeprecationWarning', code: 'RDS_CONSTS_DEPRECATED' })"
